install.windows_download: Open https://www.trae.ai/download in the browser, click the Windows installer. Saves to %USERPROFILE%\Downloads by default.
install.macos_download: Open https://www.trae.ai/download in the browser, click the macOS download (.dmg). Saves to ~/Downloads by default.
install.linux: Not supported. Trae is Windows / macOS only.
install.note: GUI IDE by ByteDance — VS Code fork with built-in AI. Echobird does NOT switch its model; model selection lives inside the app.

install_flow.summary: Download installer → user double-clicks → user clicks through the install wizard
agent_steps: Detect OS first. If Linux, refuse with the message above.
Download the installer to the user's Downloads folder using `Invoke-WebRequest` (Windows) or `curl -L -o` (macOS).
After download finishes, tell the user the EXACT file path.
Open the installer (`Start-Process` on Windows, `open` on macOS).
Tell the user: 'Trae 安装向导已打开,请按向导点击下一步完成安装。' / 'The Trae installer is open — follow the wizard to finish.'
Do NOT try to automate the GUI wizard.
tell_user: That Trae handles its own model selection — Echobird does NOT switch models for it

identity_guard.description: Trae is the international (trae.ai) build by ByteDance. It is DIFFERENT from Trae CN (trae.cn), which is the China-region build. If the user is in mainland China and has trouble reaching trae.ai, suggest Trae CN instead.

blocked_regions.zh-CN: trae.ai may be slow / blocked in mainland China — suggest installing Trae CN (trae.cn) instead.
